RESULT corresponding_author_life_earth = male higher (PAPER_REPORTED)

-------- FINAL CONCLUSION --------
CONCLUSION: Male leading authors have higher overall retraction rates than females,
with disparities varying across retraction reasons, disciplines, and countries.
The gender gap is mainly driven by misconduct (plagiarism, authorship issues, etc.)
and differs by field: males higher in biomedical, life, and physical sciences;
females higher in mathematics and computer science.
